metadata.description: A male-presenting individual in their 30s has olive skin with a smooth texture and a few small moles on the right cheek and forehead. His face is oval with a defined jawline, and his dark brown, curly hair is shoulder-length, styled with a side part, and has a slightly receding hairline at the temples. His medium-set, almond-shaped eyes are dark brown, complemented by thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows. The nose is straight with a slightly rounded tip, and the mouth has medium-full lips, with the upper lip slightly thinner than the lower. He has light stubble on his chin and jawline, and a hint of a smile, with his head tilted slightly to the left, conveying a friendly expression. His features suggest a Mediterranean or Middle Eastern background.
metadata.action_scenario: carrying a yoga mat through a city street, athletic clothes, full-body shot
